zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel De La Mare於1362年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾蕾托 賀福德時，她的父親Stephen de la Mar32歲，母親Alice de la Mare30歲。她於1374年5月之前與Nicholas Carew Esq.結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1451年在英國英格蘭素瑞貝丁頓享年89歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦貝丁頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel De La Mare于1362年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾蕾托 賀福德时，她的父亲Stephen de la Mar32岁，母亲Alice de la Mare30岁。她于1374年5月之前与Nicholas Carew Esq.结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1451年在英国英格兰素瑞貝丁頓享年89岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦貝丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Mare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Americo, Cesareo, Fernando, Ines, Javier, Jose, Marcos.  Portuguese Henrique.  Italian Antonio, Gino, Olindo, Silvio, Vito.  Dutch Andries.
Italian: topographic name for someone living by the sea, from mare ‘sea’.
English: variant of   Mear  .

variants.name: Marucci
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Antonio, Silvio, Angelo, Carmela, Domenic, Donato, Egidio, Guido, Licinio, Lorenzo, Luciano.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Maruccio, a pet form of Mare or Mari .

variants.name: Marelli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Giuseppe, Angelo, Dante.
Italian:
patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Mare  .

variants.name: Mear
meanings: English: variant of Mear , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: from Ó Meidhir ‘descendant of Meidhir’, a personal name based on meidhir ‘mirth’. Compare Myers .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isobel
meanings: Variant spelling of   Isabel .

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel De La Mare was born in 1362, in Little Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Stephen de la Mar, was 32 and her mother, Alice de la Mare, was 30. She married Nicholas Carew Esq. before May 1374. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1451, in Beddington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 89, and was buried in Beddington, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel De La Mare est née en 1362, à Little Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Stephen de la Mar, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice de la Mare, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Carew Esq. avant mai 1374. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1451, à Beddington, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Beddington, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel De La Mare 1362 in Little Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Stephen de la Mar 32 und ihre Mutter Alice de la Mare 30. Sie hat vor Mai 1374 Nicholas Carew Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1451 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Beddington, Surrey, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Beddington, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel De La Mareが1362年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリットル ハーエフォードで生まれた時，父Stephen de la Marは32歳，母Alice de la Mareは30歳であった。1374年5月以前にNicholas Carew Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1451年にイギリスイギリススリーベッドイントンで89歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンベッドイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel De La Mare(이)가 1362년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 리틀 허퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stephen de la Mar(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de la Mare(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1374년 5월 이전 Nicholas Carew Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1451년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 베딩턴에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 베딩턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel De La Mare родилась в 1362 г. в местности литл хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Stephen de la Mar было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de la Mare, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Carew Esq. перед май 1374 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1451 г. в местности беддингтон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности беддингтон, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
